text: According to the philosophy of Christian Religious Education (CRE) to incorporate it into the study of theology cannot be described as a transgressive process. Rather it is an educational process which promotes the development of the individual and the church. In fact it is essential to prepare students of theology to manage the CRE philosophy. As CRE philosophy is concerned with discrimination and the unity of the intellect, emotions and spirit in the quest for wisdom, it can be concluded that students must be prepared to engage with these issues. Since CRE philosophy is directly related to biblical doctrine, the Holy Bible is the standard and authoritative text for CRE studies.
headline: Fully Human Written
